main element; parent bTGYf per ir/inventory.json
Hero section nested under ai_RNbBHWoL; Group_hero_ style_ref applied

gaps: Header CustomElement ai_RNbBKLUg (direct bTGYf child in IR) lacks data-bubble-id on its root wrapper
Pricing and workplace section CTA buttons do not carry data-style-ref or bubbleStyle() mappings
Group_badge_ style_ref is declared on ai_RNbBHWoO wrapper but SectionTag renders independent Tailwind classes

critiques.finding: Button_primary_ and Button_outline_ in bubbleStyles.ts only map to font-medium; IR styles.json defines bgcolor, border, padding, and hover states that are delegated entirely to shadcn Button variants.
critiques.alternative: Extend bubbleStyles to map IR color/border/padding tokens or document explicit shadcn-to-Bubble token bridge in MOD-DRSAM-DESIGN-SYSTEM.

critiques.finding: Hero h1 applies bubbleStyle(Text_heading_1_) then overrides with md:text-7xl, diverging from IR font_size 36 (Text_heading_1_).
critiques.alternative: Remove the md:text-7xl override or add a dedicated IR style token if larger hero typography is intentional.

critiques.finding: Prototype CrisisBar sits above the page tree with no IR counterpart on bTGYf; acceptable brownfield extension but adds layout not in bTGbC____root slice.
critiques.alternative: Mark with a documented prototype-only region or nest under a named IR group if crisis bar is later decomposed.
